action.reasoning: Observation: 25 epochs with hidden=224, n_blocks=14 gave best rmse_z500=396.92 (val) at epoch 9. EMA model continued smoothly. Training took 70min. 2.0h remaining, 21 iters. Analysis: Improvement from 403.79 to ~397 (assuming eval matches val). Best occurred at epoch 9 - so model could perhaps benefit from fewer epochs but smoother EMA. Should submit eval first to confirm gain. Decision: Submit eval to validate the new checkpoint.
